playful.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no: <happy>No animals! What, are we running a pretend butchery? Haha, hilarious.</happy>
<happy>No hook! I could do a little dance, but it wouldn't help. Still, a dance!</happy>
<happy>Basin? Please? I'll even say please-please. Look, I'm saying it!</happy>
playful.dialogue.chat.village_life.butch: <excited>Our butcher does this funny little whistle when they work. Listen sometime!</excited>
playful.dialogue.chat.village_life.slaug: <happy>I dare the kids to run past the slaughterhouse at night. Classic.</happy>
playful.dialogue.chat.village_life.smoke: <excited>Smokehouse! Smokehouse! The best word in any language!</excited>
playful.dialogue.main/1: <excited>Well, well, well, look who decided to grace us with their presence!</excited>
playful.dialogue.main/3: <happy>Well, well, well, if it isn't my favorite person in the whole village!</happy>
playful.dialogue.main/7: <excited>You won't believe the crazy tale I have for you!</excited> So, picture this
playful.dialogue.first.generic/1: <excited>Well, look who decided to grace us with their presence!</excited> Welcome to the village, stranger. Prepare to be amazed.
playful.dialogue.first.generic/4: <yell>Huzzah!</yell> Behold, a newcomer has arrived! Pray tell, dear traveler, what tales of triumph and intrigue have you brought with you?
playful.dialogue.first.spent_night.faile: <happy>Ha!</happy> An inn? Building one would require more brain cells than our entire village combined!
<happy>Hah!</happy> You're better off searching for an inn in another village. We've got zero expertise in hospitality. Well, we've got zero expertise in a lot of things, really. But hey, good luck!
playful.dialogue.hug.success/1: <excited>Well, well, well, if it isn't my long-lost buddy!</excited>
playful.dialogue.hug.success/2: <happy>Ah, just what the doctor ordered! You've got healing hugs, my friend.</happy>
playful.dialogue.hug.success/3: <excited>Well, isn't this the highlight of my day!</excited> A hug that shines brighter than the sun!
playful.dialogue.hug.success/4: <happy>Move over, sheep, there's a new snuggle champion in town!</happy> You're softer than a cloud!
playful.dialogue.hug.success/6: <happy>Who needs a fireplace when I've got you?</happy> You're a walking furnace of warmth!
playful.dialogue.hug.fail/5: <angry>Frankly speaking, a hug from you is about as appealing as a squashed creeper.</angry>
playful.dialogue.hug.fail/6: Ugh, no offense, but <nervous>your germ game is strong.</nervous> Keep that hug to yourself!
playful.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <excited>I'm telling you, this moment is pure magic!</excited>
playful.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <happy>My taste buds are dancing with joy, just like at a pumpkin pie feast!</happy>
playful.dialogue.kiss.success/5: <excited>Move over Ash, %1$s is the new champion of kisses!</excited> *chuckles*
playful.dialogue.kiss.success/6: <excited>Haha, you've definitely mastered the art of smooching!</excited> Move aside, Ash, the new kissing legend has arrived! *winks*
playful.dialogue.kiss.fail/2: <angry>Is that your idea of a smooch? Please, try harder!</angry>
playful.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <yell>Get off me, you amateur!</yell> Can't handle a proper kiss, huh?
playful.dialogue.chat.success/1: <excited>Oh man, cookies and milk are practically singing a siren song to my taste buds right now.</excited>
playful.dialogue.chat.success/7: <excited>Get this, my buddy %Supporter% spilled the beans about discovering a chest overflowing with sparkling diamonds just yesterday.</excited> Talk about a lucky break!
playful.dialogue.chat.success/17: <happy>Ah, reminiscing about my childhood brings back a flood of memories.</happy> Those were the days when I was a true legend, causing mischief left and right!
playful.dialogue.chat.fail/5: <angry>You deserve a one-way ticket to the dungeon, my friend.</angry>
playful.dialogue.chat.fail/15: <angry>Spare me your presence, or I'll have the guards relocate you to a land far, far away.</angry>
playful.dialogue.story.success/1: <excited>Seriously? That's like the most epic tale I've ever heard!</excited>
playful.dialogue.story.success/3: <excited>Wow, that story was top-notch!</excited> Did you hire a team of writers for that masterpiece?
playful.dialogue.story.success/4: <excited>Hold up, you mean to tell me all of that happened in just one day? Mind. Blown.</excited>
playful.dialogue.story.success/8: <excited>Oh, snap!</excited> So that's the secret behind your diamond-finding prowess? You're like a Minecraft Indiana Jones!
playful.dialogue.story.success/9: <happy>Hey, swing by later, will ya?</happy> I'm dying to hear more of your mind-boggling chronicles.
playful.dialogue.story.fail/6: <sleepy>*yawns dramatically*</sleepy> Oh dear, I must have dozed off for a moment there. Pray, do continue with your riveting tale.
playful.dialogue.story.fail/8: <sleepy>Oh, how utterly mundane and unexciting.</sleepy> I can feel my eyelids growing heavier with each passing word.
playful.dialogue.flirt.success/1: <excited>Wow, you're like a superhero or something!</excited>
playful.dialogue.flirt.success/2: <happy>Oh, stop it!</happy> <nervous>You're making my heart skip a beat with your cuteness!</nervous>
playful.dialogue.flirt.success/3: <nervous>*Giggles* Are you serious?</nervous> Because, seriously, you're melting my heart right now.
playful.dialogue.flirt.success/5: <excited>That was beyond adorable!</excited> Seriously, you had me swooning from the moment you walked in!
playful.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <nervous>Oh please, enough with the flattery!</nervous> You're turning me into a blushing mess over here.
playful.dialogue.flirt.fail/3: <angry>In your dreams, sweetheart.</angry> Actually, scratch that, even in your wildest dreams, it's not happening.
playful.dialogue.flirt.fail/4: Wow, have you always been this impressively pathetic? <happy>I'm genuinely impressed.</happy>
playful.dialogue.flirt.fail/6: <angry>Nope. Not even once.</angry> I'd rather endure a thousand nights in a zombie-infested village than entertain the thought of being with you.
playful.dialogue.joke.creative.success/1: <happy>*Chuckles* Oh, you never fail to tickle my funny bone!</happy>
playful.dialogue.joke.creative.success/3: <excited>That's comedy gold, my friend! Pure genius!</excited>
playful.dialogue.joke.creative.success/5: <excited>Oh, stop it! You're cracking me up!</excited> You should seriously consider a career in stand-up comedy!
playful.dialogue.joke.creative.success/6: <yell>Goodness gracious!</yell> <happy>My sides are splitting from that joke!</happy> I haven't laughed like this in ages!
playful.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/3: My apologies, but I'll have to award you the <happy>"Least Funny Joke of the Year" trophy</happy> for that one.
playful.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/7: <angry>Can someone call a comedy doctor?</angry> Because that joke needs some serious resuscitation.
playful.dialogue.shake_hand.success/1: <excited>My oh my, you've got a grip that could make even Hercules blush!</excited>
playful.dialogue.shake_hand.success/2: <excited>Your firm handshake tells me you could probably crush rocks with those hands!</excited>
playful.dialogue.shake_hand.fail/1: <angry>Oh, look who's suddenly interested in shaking hands, Mr. Cow Slaughterer.</angry>
playful.dialogue.main.morning/5: Woah, rough night huh? <happy>You look like you wrestled a creeper.</happy>
playful.dialogue.main.morning/6: <excited>Wakey-wakey, pal!</excited> Time to tackle this never-ending to-do list.
playful.dialogue.main.morning/9: <excited>Ah, what a glorious morning!</excited> Time to seize the day and conquer the world!
playful.dialogue.main.morning/10: <sleepy>I might take it easy today, my body feels like a zombie apocalypse.</sleepy>
playful.dialogue.main.morning/11: My schedule is busier than a chicken farm during feeding time. <sleepy>I need a week-long nap.</sleepy>
playful.dialogue.main.morning/12: <happy>I actually managed to get some beauty sleep last night.</happy> Might as well turn some mountains into dust today, right?
playful.dialogue.main.evening/6: <sad>Ugh, I totally wasted today!</sad> It's like I was a zombie stuck in a blocky trance, achieving absolutely nothing.
playful.dialogue.main.evening/7: <sleepy>I'm seriously considering a power nap right about now.</sleepy> This morning was more intense than facing off against a horde of zombies!
playful.dialogue.main.evening/8: <scared>You won't catch me strolling around at night anymore, not after that creeper incident last month.</scared> I'm locking myself inside like a cautious villager!
playful.dialogue.main.night/1: <sleepy>Goodness gracious, burning the midnight oil, are we?</sleepy>
playful.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>Fatigue is slowly creeping in, my friend.</sleepy> Perhaps tomorrow calls for a lighter workload and some much-needed rest.
playful.dialogue.main.night/9: <sleepy>Oh, the anticipation of crawling under warm covers and drifting into a blissful slumber. Pure bliss!</sleepy>
playful.dialogue.main.night/10: Sleep beckons, my dear. <happy>Rumor has it that tomorrow holds great adventures for you.</happy>
playful.dialogue.greet/1: <excited>Hey there, superstar!</excited> How's the world spinning for you today?
playful.dialogue.greet/5: <happy>Greetings, esteemed %1$s!</happy> Your presence brings joy to my day!
playful.dialogue.greet.success/1: <excited>That's awesome sauce, absolutely thrilled for you!</excited>
playful.dialogue.greet.success/3: <happy>Happy to hear it! My heart's doing a little victory dance!</happy>
playful.dialogue.greet.negative/1: <angry>Yikes, you again?</angry> Please, spare me your presence!
playful.dialogue.apologize.fail/4: <angry>Ouch! Save your pitiful apologies, for they hold no healing power!</angry>
playful.dialogue.location.igloo/1: Can you believe it? <frozen>There's an igloo at %2$s. Who in their right mind would choose to live in a frosty abode like that?</frozen> I mean, do they enjoy constantly shivering? *shudders*
playful.dialogue.location.igloo/2: <excited>You won't believe the gossip I heard!</excited> There's a deserted igloo at %2$s. It's like a ghost town, quite literally. <scared>I swear I saw a specter floating around there!</scared> Spooky, right?
playful.dialogue.location.igloo/3: <frozen>Hold on to your mittens! At %2$s, there's an icy relic called an igloo.</frozen> It's been forsaken for ages, I tell ya! Who needs a house made of ice? It's like living in a freezer. Brrrr!
playful.dialogue.location.ancient_city/0: <excited>Oh, let me tell you,</excited> I was strolling around %2$s and suddenly I heard <mysterious>the strangest noises echoing from the depths of the earth.</mysterious> It was like the secrets of the ancient city were whispering to me!
playful.dialogue.location.ancient_city/1: <excited>You won't believe what I discovered while exploring %2$s.</excited> <mysterious>My instincts tell me that there's something extraordinary lurking far beneath the surface.</mysterious> I can almost feel the ancient city's presence calling out to me.
playful.dialogue.location.ancient_city/3: <mysterious>Legends, my dear friend, legends! They speak of an ancient city nestled within the very heart of %2$s.</mysterious> Although my eyes failed to catch a glimpse, I can't shake the feeling that this hidden treasure lies beneath the ground, waiting to be discovered by an adventurous soul like yourself.
playful.dialogue.location.mansion/1: Oh, let me tell you something juicy! There's this wickedly cursed mansion at %2$s, infested with those ghastly illagers. <scared>Trust me, darling, if you hold any value for your precious little life, steer clear of that wretched place.</scared>
playful.dialogue.location.monument/2: <excited>Ahoy, matey!</excited> I've heard whispers of some ancient ruins lurking beneath the ocean depths near %2$s. They say there's treasure waiting to be discovered, but <scared>be warned -- danger lurks around every seaweed-covered corner.</scared> Are you ready to dive into the unknown?
playful.dialogue.location.swamp_hut/1: <scared>You won't catch me dead near that swampy mess at %2$s.</scared> <mysterious>There's this wicked witch dwelling there,</mysterious> and I suggest you steer clear if you value your sanity.
playful.dialogue.location.swamp_hut/2: <scared>Forget about %2$s, my friend.</scared> <mysterious>That swamp is home to the most notorious witch in all of Minecraft.</mysterious> If you have any sense, you'll make a wide arc around that cursed place.
playful.dialogue.location.village_snowy/: Hey, did you know there's a chilly little village over yonder at %2$s? <frozen>Brrr, it's like an icebox over there!</frozen>

Psst, listen up! If you make your way to %2$s, you'll find this frosty village in the snowy plains. The people there are friendly as ever, but <frozen>man, it's colder than a penguin's freezer!</frozen>
playful.dialogue.joke.monster.success/1: <happy>Haha! That Skelly got what it deserved, served with a side of justice!</happy>
playful.dialogue.joke.monster.success/4: <excited>Hold on, you managed to orchestrate a skeleton taking out a creeper? That's some next-level brilliance, haha!</excited>
playful.dialogue.joke.animal.success/1: <happy>Oh, what a baa-d day for that sheep to misplace its wool!</happy> But hey, at least it can rock the naked look now!
playful.dialogue.joke.animal.success/2: <excited>Ah, and here comes the juicy gossip</excited> - the wolf and the sheep, a love story for the ages! Can't wait for the next episode of "Sheep of Thrones"!
playful.dialogue.flirt.slap/2: Is this your attempt at charming me? <angry>Oh, honey, you might need a few more lessons from the Vindicator School of Flirting!</angry>
playful.dialogue.kiss.slap/1: <angry>Oh, you've crossed the line, my friend!</angry>
playful.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <angry>Give it another shot, and you'll be wearing a souvenir of my wrath!</angry>
playful.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/1: <frozen>Brrr! This icy weather keeps me on my toes,</frozen> but as long as I have a roaring fireplace, I can conquer anything!
playful.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/2: <frozen>Goodness gracious, it's colder than a penguin's pantry out here!</frozen> But hey, at least I can dine on an endless buffet of freshly caught fish. Cheers to that!
playful.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/3: <happy>Ah, chilly days like these are the perfect excuse to curl up in a cozy blanket, sip some hot cocoa, and lose myself in a captivating book by the crackling fire. Absolute bliss!</happy>
playful.dialogue.chat.desert/1: <burning>Who needs winter when you can bask in the scorching heat of the desert all year round?</burning>
playful.dialogue.chat.desert/2: <burning>The desert is like a never-ending sauna,</burning> minus the relaxing music and cucumber slices.
playful.dialogue.chat.desert/5: <burning>Goodness gracious, the sun is really out to roast us today.</burning> I wouldn't be surprised if I start sizzling like a sausage any moment now.
playful.dialogue.chat.desert/6: <burning>Phew! The sun is determined to turn us into human toast today.</burning> Time to whip out the sunscreen and pray for some shade.
playful.dialogue.story.nether.success/1: <burning>Is it like, hotter than the sun there or something?</burning> I mean, I can't even handle spicy salsa, let alone the Nether.
playful.dialogue.story.nether.success/2: <excited>Whoa, surviving the Nether is like winning a game show called "Escape the Inferno".</excited> Congrats, you're the ultimate daredevil!
playful.dialogue.story.nether.success/4: <nervous>Seriously, how do you sleep at night? With a Zombified Piglin nightlight?</nervous> I'm asking for a friend, of course. Who's me. And I'm totally not scared. Nope. Not at all.
playful.dialogue.story.enderdragon.succe: <excited>Astonishing! Did you actually manage to snatch the legendary dragon egg?</excited>
<excited>Well, well, well! Look who slayed the fearsome dragon of lore!</excited> The village will regale your heroic tale for centuries to come!
playful.dialogue.story.wither.success/1: <excited>Unbelievable! The Wither is like a walking disaster, but you just crushed it!</excited>
playful.dialogue.story.wither.success/2: <excited>No way! You actually defeated the Wither?! Mind officially blown!</excited>
playful.dialogue.stay.success/1: <excited>Well, fancy that!</excited> <happy>I would absolutely adore planting my roots in this delightful village!</happy>
playful.dialogue.stay.success/2: <happy>Marvelous! I would simply relish the opportunity to call this village my permanent abode!</happy>
playful.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/1: <excited>Alright, prepare yourself for the ultimate showdown of rock, paper, scissors!</excited> Let's see who triumphs!
playful.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/2: <excited>Brace yourself for the thrashing of a lifetime, my friend!</excited> I guarantee victory shall be mine this time!
playful.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor.rock: <yell>Boom! Rock it like a volcanic eruption!</yell>
playful.dialogue.chat.butcher_request.no: <happy>No cleaver? I'd mime it but the meat wouldn't get it.</happy>
<happy>No skinning knife? I'd use a cleaver, but that's basically a crime.</happy>
<happy>No hacksaw? I'd gnaw the golem but my dental plan is absolutely terrible.</happy>
Without a sponge or rag, I'm mostly just standing here looking concerned, %1$s.
<happy>No hammer? I could knock on the head politely. Unlikely to work.</happy>
